name: Philadelphia Eagles
description: Philly's NFL team — from 1933 birds to back-to-back Super Bowl champs.

questions.q: In what year were the Philadelphia Eagles founded?

source.notes: Founded by Bert Bell and Lud Wray as a replacement for the Frankford Yellow Jackets.

questions.q: What was the previous Philadelphia NFL franchise the Eagles replaced after it went bankrupt?
What New Deal program's insignia inspired the team's 'Eagles' name?

source.notes: The NRA's blue eagle was a ubiquitous 1933 symbol.

questions.q: Who has been the principal owner of the Eagles since 1994?
Which division do the Eagles compete in?
Which NFC East rival do Eagles fans often consider their primary rival?
What is the name of the Eagles' current home stadium (since 2003)?
Where did the Eagles play their home games from 1971 to 2002?
Which Super Bowl did the Eagles win for their first championship in the modern era?

source.notes: Beat the New England Patriots 41-33 on Feb 4, 2018.

questions.q: Which head coach led the Eagles to their first Super Bowl win in 2018?
Who was the Eagles' MVP backup quarterback in their Super Bowl LII victory?

source.notes: Famous for catching the 'Philly Special' touchdown.

questions.q: Which Eagles head coach led them to Super Bowl LIX in 2025 — their second Super Bowl win?

source.notes: Beat the Kansas City Chiefs 40-22 on Feb 9, 2025.

questions.q: Which Eagles QB led the team to Super Bowl appearances LVII and LIX?

source.notes: audit-corrected 2026-05-09: removed inaccurate 'back-to-back' framing — SB LVII (2022 season) and SB LIX (2024 season) were two seasons apart. Hurts was named Super Bowl LIX MVP.

questions.q: How many NFL Championships did the Eagles win before the Super Bowl era (pre-1966)?
Who was the Eagles' Hall of Fame head coach who led them to back-to-back NFL titles in 1948 and 1949?
Which legendary Eagles QB led them to Super Bowl XXXIX (a loss to the Patriots in 2005)?

source.notes: Coached by Andy Reid; six Pro Bowls during his Eagles career.

questions.q: Which Hall of Fame Eagles linebacker was nicknamed 'Concrete Charlie'?

source.notes: The last NFL player to play full-time on offense and defense (1960).

questions.q: Which Hall of Fame defensive end nicknamed 'The Minister of Defense' starred for the Eagles 1985-1992?

source.notes: Set Eagles franchise career sack record.

questions.q: What is the name of the Philadelphia Eagles' costumed bald-eagle mascot?
What is the team's unofficial fight song, played after every touchdown at home?
What are the primary colors of the Philadelphia Eagles' uniforms?
Which quarterback was named Super Bowl LIX MVP after the Eagles beat the Chiefs in February 2025?
Which running back did the Eagles sign in 2024, after which he rushed for over 2,000 yards in the season?
What signature 'tush push' play has the Eagles become famous for in recent seasons?
choices: A quarterback sneak with players pushing from behind

questions.q: In which U.S. city do the Philadelphia Eagles play their home games?

Which star wide receiver did the Eagles acquire from the Tennessee Titans before the 2022 season?

choices: A full soaring eagle clutching a football

questions.q: Against which team did the Eagles win Super Bowl LIX in 2025?
